title: Claude Oceanus V1-P (Mythos?- FULLY TESTED): I TESTED IT & IT'S ACTUALLY CRAZY!
summary: AICodeKing tested a leaked model identified as Oceanus V1-P (possibly called Mythos) across coding, visual, reasoning, and game-building tasks. The model achieved a perfect 70/70 score and reportedly outperformed Claude Opus, GPT-5.5, Gemini 3.5 Flash, DeepSeek V4 Pro, and other major models on the benchmarks tested.
